ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the county in square miles */,
  "voter_density" REAL /* Voter density, calculated as the number of registered voters per square mile */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population that is registered to vote */,
  "voting_system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary voting system used in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_voting_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_system_id") REFERENCES voting_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter registration record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of eligible voters in the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the voter registration record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the voter registration record was last updated */,
  "eligible_voters_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population that is eligible to vote */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "political_experience" TEXT /* Political experience of the candidate (e.g., years in office, previous positions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate in the county */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of total votes received by the candidate in the county */,
  "vote_share" REAL /* Share of votes received by the candidate in the county relative to the total votes in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "swing_analysis" (
  "swing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each swing analysis record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "swing_value" REAL /* Swing value, representing the change in voting pattern */,
  "swing_category" TEXT /* Category of the swing value (e.g., red, blue) */,
  "previous_election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the previous election for comparison */,
  "swing_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the swing (e.g., left, right) */,
  "swing_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the swing (e.g., economic issues, political scandals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swing_analysis_previous_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swing_analysis_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voting system */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the voting system */,
  "year_introduced" INTEGER /* Year the voting system was introduced */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the voting system information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_voting_systems" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voting system */,
  "primary_system" INTEGER /* Indicates if the system is the primary voting system for the county */,
  "secondary_system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a secondary voting system used in the county (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_voting_systems_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_voting_systems_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES voting_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., upcoming, completed) */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., general, primary) */,
  "number_of_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters in the election */,
  "number_of_registrants" INTEGER /* Total number of new registrants for the election */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage for the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_county_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes in the county for the election */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who voted in the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county for the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_county_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_county_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_candidate" (
  "election_candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate in each election */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the candidate in the election (e.g., running, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_candidate_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_candidate_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the voters (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voters */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voters */,
  "number_of_voters" INTEGER /* Number of voters in the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
